HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

PlaneWave Class Reference
Modules » Incident Fields

Models a plane wave as an incident field in homogeneous or layered media. More...

static void EnableAccurate ()
 Enable high-accuracy integration for excitations.

static bool NeedsAccurate = false
 Global toggle: request accurate/expensive integration path.
 

Detailed Description

Models a plane wave as an incident field in homogeneous or layered media.

Definition at line 21 of file PlaneWave.h.

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

◆ PlaneWave() [1/2]

PlaneWave::PlaneWave ( dcmplx wvl,
double eps,
rvec dir,
cvec po )

Construct a homogeneous plane wave.

Parameters
wvlIncident wavelength.
epsPermittivity of the homogeneous medium.
dirPropagation direction (3D vector).
poPolarization vector.

Normalizes the input propagation direction, sets the wavenumber \(\mathbf{k} = \frac{2\pi}{\lambda}\sqrt{\varepsilon_r}\,\hat{\mathbf{d}}\), the medium impedance \( z = Z_0/\sqrt{\varepsilon_r}\), and stores polarization.

Definition at line 14 of file PlaneWave.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ PlaneWave() [2/2]

PlaneWave::PlaneWave ( std::vector< dcmplx > k_L,
std::vector< dcmplx > epsL,
std::vector< dcmplx > muL,
std::vector< double > zValsInterfaces,
std::vector< double > thickness,
rvec propDir,
cvec po )

Construct a plane wave in a layered medium.

Parameters
k_LWave numbers per layer.
epsLPermittivity values per layer.
muLPermeability values per layer.
zValsInterfacesz-coordinates of interfaces.
thicknessThicknesses of layers.
propDirPropagation direction.
poPolarization vector.

Allocates a LayeredMediaUtils helper and initializes propagation parameters depending on whether the wave impinges from +z (top half-space) or −z (bottom). Also computes the transverse wavenumber magnitude \(k_\rho\).

Definition at line 27 of file PlaneWave.cpp.

Member Function Documentation

◆ complexSqrt()

dcmplx PlaneWave::complexSqrt ( dcmplx arg)
inline

Computes the square root of a complex number with proper handling of negative imaginary parts.

This function ensures correct computation of the square root for cases where the imaginary part is negative or zero to maintain consistency in branch cuts.

Parameters
argThe input complex number.
Returns
The square root of the input complex number.

◆ EvaluateE()

cvec PlaneWave::EvaluateE ( rvec r)
virtual

Evaluate the electric field at a given position (homogeneous).

Parameters
rObservation point.
Returns
Electric field vector at the point.

Uses \(\mathbf{E}(\mathbf{r}) = \mathbf{p}\,e^{j\mathbf{k}\cdot\mathbf{r}}\).

Implements IncidentField.

Definition at line 64 of file PlaneWave.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ EvaluateH()

cvec PlaneWave::EvaluateH ( rvec r)
virtual

Evaluate the magnetic field at a given position (homogeneous).

Parameters
rObservation point.
Returns
Magnetic field vector at the point.

Uses \(\mathbf{H}(\mathbf{r}) = \frac{1}{z}\,\hat{\mathbf{k}}\times\mathbf{p}\,e^{j\mathbf{k}\cdot\mathbf{r}}\).

Implements IncidentField.

Definition at line 150 of file PlaneWave.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ EvaluateLayeredEandH()

std::vector< cvec > PlaneWave::EvaluateLayeredEandH ( rvec r)
virtual

Evaluate the electric and magnetic fields at a given position in layered media.

Parameters
rObservation point.
Returns
Vector containing electric and magnetic field complex vectors at the point.

Decomposes the incident polarization into local TE/TM unit vectors, computes incident amplitudes, queries LayeredMediaUtils::Secondary to obtain up/down "secondary" wave amplitudes within the observation layer, and assembles the fields with impedance scaling in that layer. If the observation layer equals the incidence layer, the direct incident contribution is added on top of the secondary fields.

Implements IncidentField.

Definition at line 74 of file PlaneWave.cpp.

dcmplx PlaneWave::IntegrateE ( RWGFun * f)
virtual

Integrate electric field against an RWG basis function.

Parameters
fPointer to RWG function.
Returns
Complex scalar integral value.

Uses Gaussian quadrature through GaussQuad<PlaneWave>::Integrate.

Implements IncidentField.

◆ IntegrateLayeredEandH()

std::vector< dcmplx > PlaneWave::IntegrateLayeredEandH ( RWGFun * f)
virtual

Integrate layered E and H fields against an RWG basis function.

Parameters
fPointer to RWG function.
Returns
Vector of complex values (E,H contributions).

Selects EvaluateLayeredEandH for the integrand and passes the global NeedsAccurate flag to the quadrature object.

Implements IncidentField.

Definition at line 193 of file PlaneWave.cpp.

◆ writeEHData()

void PlaneWave::writeEHData ( const std::vector< rvec > & points,
const std::string & eFilename,
const std::string & hFilename )

Write E and H field values at sample points to CSV files.

Parameters
pointsList of 3D sample points.
eFilenameOutput filename for electric field.
hFilenameOutput filename for magnetic field.

Produces two files with headers:

  • E CSV: x,y,z,Ex_re,Ex_im,Ey_re,Ey_im,Ez_re,Ez_im
  • H CSV: x,y,z,Hx_re,Hx_im,Hy_re,Hy_im,Hz_re,Hz_im
    Exceptions
    std::runtime_errorif files cannot be opened for writing.
